name: ASRock B760 PRO RS WIFI WHITE ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASRock B760 PRO RS WIFI WHITE ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: White-themed ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 socket with DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0, and WiFi 6E.
